reach_why: Mostly extends known critiques of linguistic recombination, plagiarism laundering, and nonverbal discovery limits rather than opening new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links measurement invention, mathematical inexpressibility, pool-mixing, social compromise, and crow-recognition into one failure model.
falsifiable_why: Refuted by systems achieving genuine measurement or mathematical breakthroughs beyond recombination, or by showing laundering claims mis-specified.
explanation: Language-first search can mimic innovation while missing breakthroughs requiring new instruments, protocols, or formal mathematical construction.
